race.description: Id26 Ladbrokes Inter Dom Pace Champs Final (G1)
race.comment: A second row draw presents a real challenge for local champ LEAP TO FAME (11) in his bid for a third Inter Dominion Crown but he has been dominant again through the series and no horse loves Albion Park more, winning a remarkable 47 of 54 attempts here. He knows how to overcome adversity to win and the step up in distance means he could make this a test of stamina and rely on his warrior qualities. Banking on some Grant Dixon magic to get him home again. Boom mare CAPTAINS MISTRESS NZ (6) is a huge threat as she has the speed to go forward from the front row draw. Has won 11 of 12 starts since relocating to Australia and broke LEAP TO FAME's track record when winning the Rising Sun here two back. If she can stretch her brilliance to the longer distance she can beat him. Her stablemates MINOS NZ (3) and DANGEROUS (5) look the best hopes to upset the top pair after each won in the second round of heats here last week. Wouldn't shock to see WAR DAN BUDDY (1) in the first four from the ace draw.
